about.title: Your Journey to a Healthier Smile Begins Here
about.description: The goal of our clinic is to provide friendly, caring dentistry and the highest level of general, cosmetic, and advanced dental treatments. With dental practice throughout the world.

service.description: We are excited to meet you and provide the best dental care for your family.

process_accordion.title: What We Do for Your Teeth
process_accordion.description: We are committed to sustainability, Our clinic practices eco-friendly initiatives like digital records to reduce paper waste and energy-efficient equipment.

team.title: Our Friendly Dentists Team

testimonials.title: Some Heart to Heart Feedback.
testimonials.rating_desc: This rate is given by user after visiting our location

testimonial.name: Robert Lee
testimonial.content: I want to say thank you to my doctor Steve! Vivamus sagittis massa vitae bibendum rhoncus. Duis cursus. Thank you for helping me overcome my fear of the dentist! Vivamus sagittis massa vitae bibendum rhoncus. Duis cursus.

testimonial.name: Sarah Jenkins
testimonial.content: The best dental experience I've ever had. The staff was incredibly professional and the treatment was completely painless. Highly recommend to anyone looking for quality care.

testimonial.name: Michael Chen
testimonial.content: State-of-the-art facilities and a very welcoming atmosphere. Dr. Lee explained everything clearly and made me feel at ease throughout my entire root canal procedure.

blog.title: Our Latest Direct Health Blog.
blog.description: We are committed to sustainability, eco-friendly initiatives.

post.title: The Importance Of Regular Dental Check-Ups
post.excerpt: Our waiting room features a variety of plants that help purify the air.

post.title: Top 5 Benefits Of Professional Teeth Whitening
post.excerpt: We believe in promoting health and wellness in every aspect of our clinic.

post.title: Understanding Dental Implants: What You Need To Know
post.excerpt: Our clinic donates dental care services to underprivileged families.

item.a: Yes, we accept most major PPO dental insurance plans. Our team can help you verify your coverage and maximize your benefits during your first visit.
We prioritize patient comfort above all else. We use modern anesthesia and gentle techniques to ensure your treatment is as comfortable and pain-free as possible.

item.q: Do you offer emergency dental care?
item.a: Absolutely. We offer same-day emergency appointments for trauma, severe pain, or any urgent dental concerns.

item.q: How often should I visit the dentist?
item.a: For most patients, we recommend a professional cleaning and exam every six months to maintain optimal oral health and prevent problems before they start.

cta_banner.title: We Are Accepting New Patients
cta_banner.description: Don't wait for dental pain to start. Schedule your comprehensive oral exam and experience modern, gentle dentistry.

footer.description: We provide the highest level of general, cosmetic, and specialist dental treatments in New York. Your comfort is our priority.
footer.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Dental Care Clinic. All Rights Reserved.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To provide world-class dental care with a personal touch, ensuring every patient leaves with a confident smile.

certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.description: Our clinic is certified by leading global dental associations, ensuring the highest safety and treatment standards.

story.title: Our Story
story.description: Founded in 2010, we have grown from a small family practice to New York's most trusted multi-specialty dental clinic.
